brief_html: This packet is sent to establish that the client supports UDP. In particular, when the client is using a non-standard port (e.g. not port 6112), this message is used to tell the server where it should send PKT_CONNTEST messages.
remarks_html:
This packet is sent to establish that the client supports UDP. In particular, when the client is using a non-standard port (e.g. not port 6112), this message is used to tell the server where it should send PKT_CONNTEST messages.

This message should be sent in response to SID_LOGONCHALLENGE.

Not used by official clients in favor of PKT_CONNTEST2.
